spec_match.rationale: Directly explores the programmatic API of ProcessingInstruction, highlighting NodeFilter.SHOW_PROCESSING_INSTRUCTION selectors and TreeWalker queries.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive workspace: creates custom PI nodes dynamically, applies target filters, walks the TreeWalker live, and displays structured logs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent index PI query explorer description perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: Query output now uses text nodes and replaceChildren() rather than interpolating PI data into innerHTML. The tree-view escape helper covers ampersands, brackets, double quotes, and single quotes before its trusted markup wrapper is rendered.

references.rationale: The see-also list includes the required ChromeStatus feature link for 6534495085920256.

design_system.rationale: Perfect representation: leverage beautiful sandbox layouts, Ivory cards, black tables, and clean console output boxes.

summary: The PI Query Lab now renders query results with text-only DOM updates, fully escapes PI values in the tree view, and includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.
